Caption: Schematic diagram of the triple frequency ultrasonic reactor. (a) Side view of the hexagonal shaped reactor with 6 glass cylinders placed in the reactor; (b) top view of the reactor showing the sides of the reactor with different frequency emissions and the positions of glass cylinders and the piezoelectric ultrasonic transducers.
Temperature rise across the six glass cylinders at different ultrasonic frequency setting upon sonication for an hour.
Sonochemiluminescence images obtained using TFUR sonication under different frequency modes: (a) 28kHz; (b) 40kHz; (c) 70kHz; (d) 28+40kHz; (e) 28+70kHz; (f) 40+70kHz; and (g) 28+40+70kHz.
SCL emission per unit power output throughout the entire TFUR upon sonication at different frequency modes.
Sonochemiluminescence emission per unit power output at six different positions in the TFUR upon sonication at different frequency settings.
SCL emission across the six glass cylinders upon sonication at 40kHz, with red lines indicating the outline of the TFUR. Inset: positions of the six glass cylinders.
Absorbance of Rhodamine B at 554nm at six different positions upon sonication under the frequency combination of 28+40kHz for an hour.
Pseudo-first order plot for the degradation of Rhodamine B+H2O2 at six different positions upon sonication under the frequency combination of 28+40kHz for an hour.
Rhodamine B degradation in terms of sonochemical yield upon sonication for an hour under different frequency settings.
